DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE FROM THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEES, MAURYNE G.
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-23-2008 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-16-2008 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE FILED BY LEES, MAURYNE G. BURMAN, SERENA THERESA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-23-2008 - JUDGMENT. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEES, MAURYNE G. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BURMAN, SERENA THERESA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT BURMAN, SERENA THERESA
